issue_title: Fp8 scaled-mm row-wise is substantially slower than tensor-wise
surface_reasoning: Priority 3: labeled `module: performance` + `module: cuda` + `module: floatx (formerly float8)`. Title: 'Fp8 scaled-mm row-wise is substantially slower than tensor-wise' — dispatch bug where fp8 row-wise scaling matmul underperforms tensor-wise scaling. Domain relevance: fp8 scaled matmul uses specialized CUDA tensor core kernels (e.g., cuBLAS with fp8 support); row-wise vs tensor-wise scaling requires different kernel invocations and the slowness indicates wrong dispatch.
